scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run build:watch --prefix frontend" "nodemon --watch backend --ext ts --exec ./backend/node_modules/.bin/ts-node --project backend/tsconfig.json backend/app.ts"
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/public/assets backend/dist pdf-style.css
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:setup: psql postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE geoptis;" && psql geoptis < backend/schema.sql
